_comment: Image-model registry for the story-illustrator (Fal backend). Edit this to switch the default model, tune sizes/cost, or add any other Fal model. Each model has TWO Fal endpoints: endpoint_text (text-to-image, used for reference plates with no input image) and endpoint_edit (image-to-image, used for scenes that pass reference images — that's what keeps characters consistent). fal_image.py picks the endpoint based on whether --ref was given. Prices are USD per image at the listed resolution and may drift; check fal.ai. Keys here (e.g. nano-banana-2) are the friendly names you pass to --model.

nano-banana-2.label: Nano Banana 2 (Google)
nano-banana-2.notes: Fast and affordable. Default for reference plates and single-character scenes.

nano-banana-pro.label: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image)
nano-banana-pro.notes: Highest fidelity and best multi-character coherence. Use for beats with 2+ characters or fine detail.

seedream-4.label: Seedream v4 (ByteDance)
seedream-4.notes: Cheapest option and a different visual flavour. Great for testing or a non-Gemini look. Uses image_size (w,h) instead of aspect_ratio.
